Is Brainrot also Bodyrot?

About This Data Story

Every day for several weeks, I logged three things: how many hours I spent on social media, what type of exercise I did, and how long I exercised for. This story explores what that data reveals about my daily habits.

Which Exercise Takes the Longest?

Bar chart showing average exercise duration by activity type. Fencing and Walk and Talk have the highest averages, while Rest days show zero minutes.

Some activities naturally demand more time than others. This chart shows the average minutes spent on each type of exercise across all logged days.

Does Screen Time Affect Exercise?

Scatter plot showing social media hours on the x-axis and exercise minutes on the y-axis, coloured by exercise type, with a trend line.

Is there a trade-off between time on social media and time being active? Each point represents one day of logging.

How Did Habits Change Over Time?

Line chart showing average weekly exercise minutes over time, with points marked at each week.

Looking across the weeks, this chart reveals how consistent — or inconsistent — exercise habits were over the logging period.
